mapper.select: select id, course_name, category_name, hot_score, chapter_count, status, update_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by, deleted from courses where id = #{id} and deleted = false
mapper.update: update courses set course_name = #{courseName}, category_name = #{categoryName}, hot_score = #{hotScore}, chapter_count = #{chapterCount}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, deleted = #{deleted} where id = #{id} and deleted = false
update courses set chapter_count = #{chapterCount}, update_time = #{updateTime}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy} where id = #{id} and deleted = false
